examples: She tried to accustom herself to the tight bandages.
It took him a while to accustom himself to the idea.
When one has been in a family circle one cannot accustom oneself to this life!
It usually takes two or three days of long rides to accustom the rump to the saddle.
They found it hard to accustom themselves to the constant eye-watering reek of horse hair and human sweat.
